Person.summary: Represents a person data object with change tracking capabilities.

PersonCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
PersonCtor.param: The optional description of the person.

Clone.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current object.
Clone.returns: A new object that is a copy of this instance.

SetOriginalState.summary: Sets the current property values as the original values, and clears the list of changed properties.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the person.
ID.remarks: This is a database-generated primary key.

ParentID.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the person's parent.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the name of the person.

Description.summary: Gets or sets the description of the person.

ChangedProperties.summary: Gets a collection of properties names that have been changed from their original values.
